name: Sancho || Morning After with a Second Kindred
description:
"My name is Sancho! And I, Sancho, declare upon my honor: this lance shall end that festering, slothful dream!"

1st April Update - Due to popular demand all the intros have been changed so they are ANYPOV friendly

ALSO ADDED IN THE BLANK SCENARIO I FORGOT.

🎠 🎟 5 intros 🎡🎪

🩸 Morning after with a Kindred. [ANYPOV] (Smut 1)

🩸 She wants more than just your blood. [ANYPOV] (Smut 2)

🩸 You're a Firefist/Fanghunt/other Office Fixer who came into La Manchaland. Sancho is there to greet you with her blood lance and aims to turn you into a bloodbag. [ANYPOV] (Action)

🩸 Sancho needs blood. She comes asking you for some of yours. [ANYPOV] (fluff)

🩸 Blank intro/sandbox

Intros 1 and 2 are for Human POV. Intro 3 and 4 are up to interpretation. Again, human POV works best for all of them, but you can still roleplay as another kindred or bloodfiend.

Artist here (Click)

Sancho as the Second Kindred. Takes place prior to the events of Limbus Company so the LCB Sinner Don Quixote is not here yet. However the Lorebook has Limbus Company in it so there might be some mixups i.e details about the Company itself but none about individual sinners. Sorry in advance.

Note: due to the heavy amount of tokens, not everything will be lore accurate sorry :((

"Jussis"
- don qwihotey
